description:
A subset of the IMDBFace dataset.
    "training" is all files from the the first 25 people in the dataset (sorted lexicographically).
    "testing_index" takes the remaining people, finds the first 25 people who have more than 3 images in their folder, and uses the first 3 images (sorted lexicographically) as the index to look up other embeddings against.
    "testing_remainder" contains all other files in the dataset.
    "training_index_people" is the list of people in the "training" subset.
    "testing_index_people" is the list of people in the "testing_index" subset.
